2_actions.label: Two Actions
2_actions.summary: Using this item or attack costs 2 actions.

ammunition.label: Ammunition
ammunition.summary: On a blue blunder, discard matching ammo from inventory or the weapon cannot be used.

armour.label: Armour
armour.summary: A physical armour value will reduce the number of hits against the wearer by the value shown. It will also limit their ability to cast spells.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.summary: This weapon rolls +1 dice when thrown.

blast.label: Blast
blast.summary: This item has a blast effect. Blast weapons affect not only the target, but also everyone in the surrounding squares.

bludgeoning.label: Bludgeoning
bludgeoning.summary: If this attack rolls a critical hit, the target is Fatigued, even if no damage was caused. The target suffers one additional Fatigued counter for each damage caused.

burning.label: Burning
burning.summary: If this attack rolls a critical hit, the target is Burning, even if no damage was caused. Equipment with this icon is considered a source of fire.

channel.label: Channel
channel.summary: This icon will be seen alongside other statistics or abilities. At least one Magic peg must be spent to use the statistic/activate the ability.

cleave.label: Cleave
cleave.summary: If a melee attack with this weapon defeats an enemy, you may resolve the same attack against another eligible enemy, removing one hit from the roll.

cumbersome.label: Cumbersome
cumbersome.summary: If an attack with this weapon rolls any blunders and is not broken, turn this token 180 degrees. It cannot be used in this position.

defensive_re_roll.label: Defensive Re-roll
defensive_re_roll.summary: The character may force a single die to be re-rolled from any attack made against them, unless the attack ignores physical armour. Critical hits cannot be re-rolled.

effortless.label: Effortless
effortless.summary: Use this as an effortless action.

entangling.label: Entangled
entangling.summary: If this attack causes one or more hits, the target is Fatigued. On a critical hit, the target is knocked prone even if no damage is dealt.

first_strike.label: First Strike
first_strike.summary: When this character enters within melee range of an enemy (including when placed onto the gaming area or when a door opens), it gets an immediate free Melee Attack action.

forceful_melee.label: Forceful Melee
forceful_melee.summary: If your character has an unarmed combat icon on their board or in their armour slot you may use that, rolling dice equal to the number inside.

hawkeye.label: Hawkeye
hawkeye.summary: This attack ignores partial cover and can fire at engaged characters at any range without randomising the target.

hit_and_run.label: Hit and Run
hit_and_run.summary: After making a melee attack, if this character is still engaged it will make a free Mode directly away from the defender, ignoring attacks of opportunity, if there is space to do so.

immunity.label: Immunity
immunity.summary: This icon will be seen alongside other abilities and statuses. This character does not suffer any counters or effects from the ability shown.

immunity_bludgeoning.label: Immunity: Bludgeoning
immunity_bludgeoning.summary: Ignore Bludgeoning when this immunity applies.

immunity_poison.label: Immunity: Poison
immunity_poison.summary: Ignore Poison and its related effects.

immunity_sharp.label: Immunity: Sharp
immunity_sharp.summary: Ignore Sharp when this immunity applies.

indestructible.label: Indestructible
indestructible.summary: This item ignores any rule that would cause it to break. If you need to determine a random item to be broken, choose another if possible.

lasting.label: Lasting Effect
lasting.summary: Effects granted by this item last until the end of the round. Rotate the token 180 degrees as a reminder.

light.label: Light
light.summary: Treat this item as a light counter. It will move with any character carrying it, affecting the area in short range as usual.

loud.label: Loud
loud.summary: Increase the Dread by 1 when this item is used.

magical_armour_1.label: Magical Armour +1
magical_armour_1.summary: Spend an action and up to 1 Magic peg to raise Warded by the pegs spent until the item is readied again.

malacyte_regeneration_1.label: Magic Regeneration
malacyte_regeneration_1.summary: Restore 1 Magic peg in the Assessment Phase.

melee.label: Melee
melee.summary: If your character has an unarmed combat icon on their board or in their armour slot you may use that, rolling dice equal to the number inside.

parry.label: Parry
parry.summary: When the use of this item is the target of a melee attack, you may roll a combat die. Each hit scored will negate one hit from the enemy's attack as if it were physical armour.

piercing.label: Piercing
piercing.summary: Physical armour cannot negate hits from this weapon.

plunderer.label: Plunderer
plunderer.summary: If this attack causes damage, a random item from the defending character's inventory is scattered. If the attack also scored a critical hit the attacker may take take the item instead.

poison.label: Poison
poison.summary: If this weapon rolls a critical hit, the target is Poisoned, even if no damage was caused.

quickstrike.label: Quickstrike
quickstrike.summary: If this weapon rolls a critical hit during a melee attack, you may Dash or make another attack (with this or another weapon) for free immediately after the initial attack is resolved.

re_roll.label: Re-roll
re_roll.summary: If on a weapon, the character may re-roll a single combat die each time the weapon is used to attack or parry.

reach.label: Reach
reach.summary: This weapon may be used to make a Melee Attack against an enemy up to X squares away, including diagonally.

reactive.label: Reactive
reactive.summary: Once per turn, if another character start their turn or enters a square withing range of this character's attack (intentionally or otherwise), this character immediately make a free attack against them.

relentless.label: Relentless
relentless.summary: A character attacked multiple times in a single round by characters with this rule will have their physical armour reduced by 1 for each attack after the first, to minimum of zero.

restore_action.label: Restore Action
restore_action.summary: Gain the shown extra actions this turn.

restore_health.label: Restore Health
restore_health.summary: Restore the shown Health pegs to yourself or an adjacent Adventurer.

restore_magic.label: Restore Magic
restore_magic.summary: Restore the shown Magic pegs to yourself or an adjacent Adventurer.

restore_skill.label: Restore Skill
restore_skill.summary: Restore the shown Skill pegs to yourself or an adjacent Adventurer.

retaliation.label: Retaliation
retaliation.summary: If this item/character blocks at least one hit from a melee attack that rolls any blunders, resolve an attack against the attacker with one die for each blunder (skull) rolled.

scramble.label: Scramble
scramble.summary: The top number is the max height or width in square/inches of objects/characters that the character can move up or over as part of a normal Move action - they do not need to Climb them or spend any actions, just like a regular character climbing stairs.

sharp.label: Sharp
sharp.summary: If this weapon rolls a critical hit the target is Wounded, even if no damage was caused.

shield_block.label: Shield Block
shield_block.summary: This character may spend an action to raise the shield, taking this token from their inventory and placing it on their miniature to gain the effects shown inside the shield icon.

skill_frenzy_1.label: Frenzy (lvl 1)
skill_frenzy_1.summary: (1) Use before making a melee attack. Add two dice to the attack.

skill_frenzy_2.label: Frenzy (lvl 2)
skill_frenzy_2.summary: (2) Use before making a melee attack. Add three dice to the attack.

skill_frenzy_3.label: Frenzy (lvl 3)
skill_frenzy_3.summary: (3) Use before making a melee attack. Add four dice to the attack.

skill_impervious_1.label: Skill: Impervious (lvl 1)
skill_impervious_1.summary: (1) Reaction: Use whenever you would suffer a status counter of any type. Discard the counter with no effect.

skill_impervious_2.label: Skill: Impervious (lvl 2)
skill_impervious_2.summary: (2) Gain +2 Armour until the end of the round.

skill_impervious_3.label: Skill: Impervious (lvl 3)
skill_impervious_3.summary: (3) Restore 1 Health. This may take you above your starting level as long as there is space on your dashboard.

skill_natural_remedies_1.label: Natural Remedies (Lvl 1)
skill_natural_remedies_1.summary: This item grants Natural Remedies level 1.

skill_natural_remedies_2.label: Natural Remedies (Lvl 2)
skill_natural_remedies_2.summary: This item grants Natural Remedies level 2.

skill_persuasion_1.label: Skill: Persuasion (lvl 1)
skill_persuasion_1.summary: (1) Use before making a Persuade roll. Add two automatic hits to the roll.

skill_persuasion_2.label: Skill: Persuasion (lvl 2)
skill_persuasion_2.summary: (2) Make a Persuade action against an Adventurer from another party to try to dissuade them from their mission. They suffer one Fatigued counter per unblocked hit.

skill_persuasion_3.label: Skill: Persuasion (lvl 3)
skill_persuasion_3.summary: (3) Make a Persuade action against any character, adding three automatic hits. The normal options apply, except that Adventurers from other parties will not join you.

skill_reflexes_1.label: Skill: Reflexes (lvl 1)
skill_reflexes_1.summary: (1) Reaction: Use when an enemy engages you. In any order, make a Move action, ignoring attacks of opportunity, and an Attack action.

spell_cocoon.label: Cocoon (Elemental Magic)
spell_cocoon.summary: Gain the benefits of a Rest action, regardless of enemies in the room or in short range and LoS (enemies engaged with a Resting character will still prevent it as normal).

spell_rearrange_cells.label: Rearrange cells (Proximate Magic)
spell_rearrange_cells.summary: Temporarily mutate your body into that of a beast.

terrifying.label: Terrifying
terrifying.summary: If this character rolls a critical hit when attacking, the target is Terrified. If an enemy character ends their turn within short range of this character, roll the Magic Die.

unreliable.label: Unreliable
unreliable.summary: If an attack with this weapon rolls a single (skull), it has jammed. Turn the token 180 degrees.

vampiric.label: Vampiric (peg type)
vampiric.summary: If this attack rolls a critical hit the target loses a peg of the type shown if possible, in addition to any damage caused.

vicious.label: Vicious
vicious.summary: Regular hits on the blue die on attacks made with this weapon are critical hits.

warded.label: Warded
warded.summary: Gain Warded while this item is active.

x_dice.label: +X Dice
x_dice.summary: Spend Magic pegs to add that many extra attack dice when this effect is used.
